138.reason: [When the input ends with a newline character, this method increments line for the newline, but then sets curChar to '\0' and increments pos to input.length(). However, the getSymbol() method's main loop checks for whitespace and calls getChar() again, which may cause issues when pos is already at input.length(), leading to incorrect line number tracking for errors at the end of the file.]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 1.0 , reason:  [When the input ends with a newline character, this method increments line for the newline, but then sets curChar to '\0' and increments pos to input.length(). reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 1.0 , reason:  The getChar() method does not handle the case when pos > input.length() - 1 after incrementing, which can lead to an IndexOutOfBoundsException when accessing input.charAt(pos) in getSymbol().
